name: loreweave
description: A D&D-inspired text adventure engine with pixel-art rendering

scripts.build: tsc --build packages/types packages/rules packages/pixel packages/world packages/narrative services/game services/pixel-explorer
scripts.clean: tsc --build --clean packages/types packages/rules packages/pixel packages/world packages/narrative services/game services/pixel-explorer
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && tsc --build --force packages/types packages/rules packages/pixel packages/world packages/narrative services/game services/pixel-explorer
